sql_array: CREATE TABLE stylesheets (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, content XML);
SELECT id, xslt_stale(url) AS stale FROM stylesheets WHERE xslt_stale(url) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, content, xslt(url, '<xml>document</xml>') AS transformed FROM stylesheets WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 2;
CREATE TABLE xml_docs (doc_id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_content XML);
SELECT xslt_stale((SELECT url FROM stylesheets WHERE id = 1)) AS reload_stale, xml_content FROM xml_docs WHERE doc_id BETWEEN 1 AND (SELECT MAX(doc_id) FROM xml_docs);
SELECT id, url, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY url) AS url_count FROM stylesheets WHERE url IS NOT NULL AND xslt_stale(url) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT url, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN 'valid' ELSE 'invalid' END AS status FROM stylesheets GROUP BY url HAVING MAX(id) > 0;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_xml (temp_id INT, temp_content XML);
INSERT INTO temp_xml SELECT doc_id, xslt(url, xml_content) FROM stylesheets JOIN xml_docs ON stylesheets.id = xml_docs.doc_id;
SELECT temp_id, temp_content FROM temp_xml WHERE temp_id BETWEEN 1 AND 2 AND NOT temp_content IS NULL;
